title: lastreopsis exculta
intro: Lastreopsis exculta, also known as Mountain fern, is a type of fern species native to Australia and New Zealand. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Lastreopsis exculta include its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve coughs, and soothe sore throats. Herbal preparations of this plant are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized effectively in a natural and holistic way.
